problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bose-Einstein. Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
